title: Example 6-10 fatigue factor of safety for a machined AISI 1050 CD bar

notes: This file follows Example 6-10 on p316-p319.
The fluctuating tensile load varies from 0 to 16 kip, so the alternating and mean loads are both 8 kip.
The fatigue stress-concentration factor K_f is treated as a given input, as stated in the example.
The solver fetches material properties from Table A-20, surface factor coefficients from Table 6-2, and Gerber/ASME-elliptic formulas from Table 6-7 and Table 6-8.
Following the textbook example, K_f is applied to both sigma_a and sigma_m for the no-notch-yielding prescription.
